summary: Tested all 20 features: 10+ appearance customization options and Publicar en Línea section with 4 platforms. All backend deployment APIs verified (200 OK). All UI controls functional with localStorage persistence confirmed.
critical_code_review_comments: localStorage keys for new appearance settings use no prefix (font_family, card_style, etc.) while older keys use cp_ prefix (cp_event_configs) - minor inconsistency but functional

features_verified.custom_accent_color: PASS - hex input + color picker, Apply button works, toast shown, CSS variable updated
features_verified.font_family_8_options: PASS - all 8 fonts clickable (satoshi/cabinet/outfit/space/poppins/sora/dmsans/mono), active state updates correctly
features_verified.card_style_5_options: PASS - glass/solid/minimal/neon/frosted all clickable and set active state
features_verified.button_corner: PASS - rounded/pill/sharp all clickable with visual preview
features_verified.saturation: PASS - muted/normal/vivid all clickable with color swatch preview
features_verified.custom_gradient_bg: PASS - toggle enables 2 color pickers (Inicio/Fin), UI confirmed
features_verified.platforms_4: PASS - Hostinger VPS/Railway.app/Render.com/DigitalOcean all shown with expand/collapse chevron
features_verified.hostinger_steps_expand: PASS - click expands 8 steps (numbered list items visible)
features_verified.env_template_download_btn: PASS - data-testid=download-env-btn present, API returns 200 text/plain
features_verified.docker_compose_download_btn: PASS - button present, API returns 200 yaml
features_verified.health_check: PASS - URL input (data-testid=deploy-url-input) + Verificar button work, result shows latency
features_verified.api_env_template: PASS - GET /api/deployment/env-template returns 200 text/plain with env vars
features_verified.localstorage_persistence: PASS - HTML data-font/data-card/data-anim-speed attributes correctly restored after page reload

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 20 features tested and passing. Appearance settings persist via localStorage using keys: font_family, card_style, anim_speed, shadow_depth, page_width, btn_corner, scrollbar, hover_effect, saturation, custom_bg, bg_color1, bg_color2, custom_accent. HTML data-* attributes are applied on document root. Deployment section: data-testid=download-env-btn, data-testid=deploy-url-input, data-testid=health-check-btn (or button:has-text('Verificar')).
